Astrologers can also guide natives regarding health
problems like blood pre sure, gastric problems etc. and suggest
preventive measures based on Scientific calculations of planetary
positions. Suitable advice can also be given to persons who are
stubborn and are excessive in their behaviour about the effects of
their actions on mind and they may suitably be directed.
QUESTION I REGARDING CHILDREN
Some children are stubborn, lazy and lethargic, besides
highly mischievous. Some guidance for such kind of children can
also be given.
Some children are adamant and stubborn because of the
causitive effects of planets. If they do not get proper advice at the
proper time, such children would become unfruitful citizens of the
nation. Planetary combinations like that ofMARS & DRAGON
HEAD, MARS & JUPITER, MARS AND SUN etc., in the natal
chart indicate such nature. Such children can be guided by elders
by telling them the stories of great men like PARAMAHAMSA,
VIVEKANNANDA, SHARADAMANI etc.
